no: The Sellswords Salvatore novels and involves visiting the Underdark and the birthplace of Drizzt.Install Sellswords before Xan BG2. NOTE THAT SOME QUESTS ARE BEST INSTALLED AFTER OTHER NON-QUEST MODS!THE NEXT SECTION (1.9.6) COVERS A SUGGESTED INSTALL ORDER FOR OTHER QUESTS WITH NO OBVIOUS DEPENDENCIES.THE SECTION AFTER THAT (1.9.
sum: BG2 quest mod following a group of sellswords. Adds a mercenary storyline with new characters and combat encounters.

co.n: The Sellswords mod for Baldur's Gate II
